top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
WHERE l.amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN l.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_running_no_issue
FROM loan l
WHERE l.amount < 100000;
